collapse_audit.reasoning: Even with honest symptoms, passing all tests requires coordinated fixes in scheduler visibility, probe semantics, and reload mapping across separate roots.
collapse_audit.residual_hardness: Residual difficulty remains in reconstructing causal ordering across generations and ensuring fixes do not break opposite-side invariants under collision scenarios.
